ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terrence Patrick Murphy for Petitioner (by CourtCall).

The Court inquired regarding the status of sale of the property. Mr. Murphy responded that there had been a second showing of the property last week, and that they would be accepting offers this week. He anticipated being in contract within two weeks. He informed the Court that the listing broker was Ms. Gnuabe, who had been given the listing on November 20, 2015. He reported the listing price for the property was $850,000.00. The Court asked if the heirs had been provided with a copy of the listing agreement. Mr. Murphy responded that he had not previously done so, but will do so now, along with the Notice of Proposed Action recently filed by him.
The matter was continued to December 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.
Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Continued To Nov-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Terence Murphy (via court call) for (petitioner) Helena Gregorin.

Mr. Murphy reported that the sole asset is the residence in San Francisco, that it is ready for sale and will be shown within two weeks, that they expect the sale to go quickly and that they expect escrow to close in 60-90 days. The Court stated that the 7/24/15 status report indicated that the property was ready to sell, that it is 2 months later and the property has not been shown yet and confirmed with Mr. Murphy that he expected the property to be sold shortly. The status of closing the estate was continued to November 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the petition for final distribution is not on file by that date the court will require that a petition requesting additional time be filed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
